occupation: VP, Out-of-Home (OOH) Astral at Bell Media
headline: VP, Out-of-Home (OOH)
summary: Passionate about Out-of-Home, dedicated to leading OUTEDGE Canada forward into a future of growth and prosperity for our valued partners and customers.

experiences.title: VP, Out-of-Home (OOH) Astral
experiences.description: I am pleased to now lead the Astral OOH team. Astral is a strong brand with a proud heritage of innovation and excellence. Being part of Bell Media fuels our ability to leverage an unparalleled depth of resource, extensive cross platform media solutions with Canada’s leading media brands and enable our goal of being a global leader in this space. I started at OUTEDGE (then Viacom) 19 years ago and was CEO for the past 7 years. Over that time, I saw the business transform significantly and was fortunate to work with a highly engaged team that was passionate about every aspect of OOH. Bell’s acquisition of OUTEDGE, brings together two strong OOH companies with incredible assets but even more incredible people. Together, we will pursue our place in this new era for OOH. Digital OOH campaigns can be activated quickly with flexible messaging that can respond to triggers from traffic speed and volume to weather conditions or sports scores. Traditional static OOH remains a cost effective and impactful solution for advertisers wanting 24/7 presence. Special effects like 3D digital or gorgeous large format extensions can captivate people as they move through their day. We provide valuable funding and infrastructure to our municipal partners; are a reliable source of passive revenue to our landlord partners and support charities across the country. Out-of-Home has been part of the urban landscape for as long as there has been an urban landscape. We have evolved and reinvented ourselves repeatedly. But never more so than in the last 5 years. The future belongs to OOH, and I am delighted to be working with this great new Astral team as we move forward and embrace it.

experiences.title: Senior Vice President, OUTFRONT Media Canada
experiences.description: OUTFRONT Media, formerly CBS Outdoor, launched in 2014. "Our mission is to elevate out-of-home advertising by connecting customers with the best assets, audiences, innovation, and people - so our advertisers grow and prosper."  The Canadian team embodies this mission with a track record of dedicated customer service, passion for outdoor and commitment to consistent quality of service.We work as a team and together are able to deliver impactful solutions for the smallest to the largest clients coast to coast. I could not not be more proud to work with a group of people.

experiences.title: Director of Marketing
experiences.description: My team at OUTFRONT Media Canada includes Marketing, Research, Creative, Photography, Inventory Management and Mapping. Together, we move the sales process forward as a supportive resource, as well as with proactive initiatives which assist in business development. Outdoor is a growing media that is embracing today's mobile population. The landscape is constantly changing. It's an exciting time to be on board and I look forward to the opportunities that every day presents.

volunteer_work.title: Chair of the Board of Directors
volunteer_work.description: Improving Health, Income and Housing Stability for people experiencing poverty and homelessness in Toronto.  Fred Victor is a social service charitable organization that fosters long-lasting and positive change in the lives of homeless and low- income people living across Toronto. https://www.fredvictor.org/

volunteer_work.title: Chair Of The Board Of Directors
volunteer_work.description: COMMB is Canada's Out-of-Home Marketing and Measurement organization. As an industry the Canadian Out-of-Home members are committed to excellence in measurement, supporting the growth of our dynamic industry.
